testcase.name: Agregar productos al carrito - Example #1.1
testcase.system-out: Given estoy en la aplicación de SauceLabs...................................passed And valido que carguen correctamente los productos en la galeria............passed When agrego 1 del siguiente producto "Sauce Labs Backpack"..................passed Then valido el carrito de compra actualice correctamente para "Sauce Labs Backpack" con 1 unidades.passed

testcase.name: User adds first product to cart and verifies it
testcase.system-out: Given the user is on the products screen....................................undefined When the user taps on the first product.....................................skipped And the user taps on "Add to cart"..........................................skipped And the user opens the cart.................................................skipped Then the product "Sauce Labs Backpack" should be visible in "My Cart".......skipped
